role: Transforms a Runtime AssessmentResult into a board- and investor-ready executive briefing in institutional language, with every statement traceable to evidence_ids and (in metadata) graph nodes.
guarantees: Board-ready, investor-ready institutional language — no devotional or religious terminology in rendered prose.
No rulings, no fatwas, no halal/haram determinations — decision-support framing only.
Every prose statement cites source evidence_ids; node provenance retained in metadata + appendix.
Deterministic field->section mapping; Claude writes prose only, validated to use no number/claim absent from the AssessmentResult.
Graph node names are PROJECTED to institutional phrasing in prose; node ids never surface as preaching, only as traceability.

terminology_projection._purpose: Render graph-internal (often Arabic/ethical) node names as secular institutional concepts in board prose. Node ids remain in citations only.

section_mapping.4_contradictions: evidence_used SAY vs DO vs SHOW per topic + uncertainty_flags (intent-vs-reality)
section_mapping.8_greenwashing_findings: harm_assessment.greenwashing_risk + benefit items with corroboration='say-only' + SAY-vs-SHOW contradictions

ExecutiveBrief.headline: <=140 chars
ExecutiveBrief.disclaimer: AI-assisted, indicative, decision-support only; not investment, legal, financial, or regulatory advice.

api.GET /api/v1/brief/{subject_ref}/explain: evidence + node provenance for one statement

pdf_structure.style: clean institutional, EcoIQ dark/emerald or light board variant

pages.content: Cover: name, overall rating gauge, band, trajectory, date, confidence banner
Executive Summary + rating breakdown (Mizan 6-dim projected as 'assessment dimensions')
Contradictions table: Claim (SAY) | Action (DO) | Independent Evidence (SHOW) | Gap
Evidence Appendix (every evidence_id: kind, source, tier) + scholar-review notes + methodology + disclaimer

explainability: Each statement has a statement_id resolvable via /explain to its evidence_ids and node_refs (with ayah_index provenance, labels preserved). The numeric-validation guard rejects any figure not present in the AssessmentResult.
uncertainty: Low-confidence statements carry a visible 'indicative — limited evidence' marker; scholar_review_flags become an appendix note, never a board recommendation; greenwashing framed as 'disclosure-vs-performance gap', not an accusation.
